phrases.intent_en: Ask where Shakespeare & Company bookshop is
phrases.text_local: Où est la librairie Shakespeare and Company ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo eh lah lee-breh-REE shayks-PEER ahnd KUHM-pah-nee
phrases.cultural_note: At 37 Rue de la Bûcherie, facing Notre-Dame. This legendary English bookshop lets travelers sleep among the books. Browse freely — no photos in the rare book room upstairs.

responses.english: It is by the Seine, across from Notre-Dame.
responses.phonetic: seh toh bor duh lah sen, ahn fass duh notr-DAM
responses.local: C'est au bord de la Seine, en face de Notre-Dame.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the nearest public toilets are
phrases.text_local: Où sont les toilettes publiques les plus proches ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo sohn lay twah-LET poo-BLEEK lay ploo prosh
phrases.cultural_note: Paris has free public 'Sanisettes' automated toilets on many streets. Look for the grey kiosks.

responses.english: There are public toilets on the square, across the way.
responses.phonetic: eel ee ah day sah-nee-ZET soor lah plass, ahn fass
responses.local: Il y a des Sanisettes sur la place, en face.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for a cheap restaurant recommendation
phrases.text_local: Vous connaissez un bon restaurant pas cher dans le coin ?
phrases.pronunciation: voo koh-neh-SAY uhn bohn res-toh-RAHN pah SHEHR dahn luh KWAHN
phrases.cultural_note: Avoid Rue de la Huchette — it's a tourist trap. Head to Rue Mouffetard for better value. Look for restaurants where locals eat, especially around the market street.

responses.english: There are cheap little restaurants on Rue de la Huchette.
responses.phonetic: eel ee ah day puh-TEE res-toh-RAHN pah shehr roo duh lah oo-SHET
responses.local: Il y a des petits restaurants pas chers rue de la Huchette.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the Rue Mouffetard market street
phrases.text_local: La rue Mouffetard est par où ?
phrases.pronunciation: lah roo moo-fuh-TAR eh par OO
phrases.cultural_note: Rue Mouffetard is one of Paris's oldest market streets. The open-air market runs Tuesday-Sunday mornings at the bottom of the street. Great cheese shops, bakeries, and crêpe stands.

responses.english: Rue Mouffetard is a ten-minute walk, heading south.
responses.phonetic: lah roo moo-fuh-TAR eh tah dee mee-NOOT ah pyay, vehr luh sood
responses.local: La Rue Mouffetard est à dix minutes à pied, vers le sud.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the nearest pharmacy is
phrases.text_local: Où est la pharmacie la plus proche ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo eh lah far-mah-SEE lah ploo prosh
phrases.cultural_note: French pharmacies display a green cross. Pharmacists can advise on minor ailments.

responses.english: There is one on Boulevard Saint-Michel.
responses.phonetic: eel ee ahn ah oon soor luh bool-VAR san mee-SHEL
responses.local: Il y en a une sur le boulevard Saint-Michel.
